---
name: Customer / user feedback
about: General feedback from users or design partners
title: '[Feedback] '
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

**Summary**
One sentence.

**Detail**
What they said or did (quote or paraphrase).

**Source**
In-app form / call / email / design partner.

**Suggested action**
Triage: bug / feature / content / other; link to roadmap if relevant.
